'''âp-r-th''' ('''kaparath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:madden|madden]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:madden|madden]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-r-th
|-
! Lemma
| kaparath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiparath|thiparath]] || [[word:jiparath|jiparath]] || [[word:shiparath|shiparath]] || [[word:kiparath|kiparath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuparath|thuthuparath]] || [[word:jujuparath|jujuparath]] || [[word:shushuparath|shushuparath]] || [[word:kukuparath|kukuparath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuparath|thuparath]] || [[word:juparath|juparath]] || [[word:shuparath|shuparath]] || [[word:kuparath|kuparath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuparath|thuparath]] || [[word:juparath|juparath]] || [[word:shuparath|shuparath]] || [[word:kuparath|kuparath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theparath|theparath]] || [[word:jeparath|jeparath]] || [[word:sheparath|sheparath]] || [[word:keparath|keparath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoparath|thothoparath]] || [[word:jojoparath|jojoparath]] || [[word:shoshoparath|shoshoparath]] || [[word:kokoparath|kokoparath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoparath|thoparath]] || [[word:joparath|joparath]] || [[word:shoparath|shoparath]] || [[word:koparath|koparath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoparath|thoparath]] || [[word:joparath|joparath]] || [[word:shoparath|shoparath]] || [[word:koparath|koparath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠparath|thĂŠparath]] || [[word:jĂŠparath|jĂŠparath]] || [[word:shĂŠparath|shĂŠparath]] || [[word:kĂŠparath|kĂŠparath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathaparath|thathaparath]] || [[word:jajaparath|jajaparath]] || [[word:shashaparath|shashaparath]] || [[word:kakaparath|kakaparath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaparath|thaparath]] || [[word:japarath|japarath]] || [[word:shaparath|shaparath]] || [[word:kaparath|kaparath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thaparath|thaparath]] || [[word:japarath|japarath]] || [[word:shaparath|shaparath]] || [[word:kaparath|kaparath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shaparath|shaparath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshaparath|goshaparath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishaparath|gokishaparath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shaparathnĂŒ|shaparathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshaparathnknĂŒ|goshaparathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishaparathnĂŒ|gokishaparathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shaparathshĂ«|shaparathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshaparathnkshĂ«|goshaparathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishaparathshĂ«|gokishaparathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaparathro|shaparathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaparathnkro|goshaparathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaparathro|gokishaparathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shaparathmu|shaparathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaparathnkmu|goshaparathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaparathmu|gokishaparathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shaparathsher|shaparathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshaparathnksher|goshaparathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishaparathsher|gokishaparathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shaparathng|shaparathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshaparathnkng|goshaparathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishaparathng|gokishaparathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shaparathya|shaparathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshaparathnkya|goshaparathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishaparathya|gokishaparathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shaparathyam|shaparathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshaparathnkyam|goshaparathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishaparathyam|gokishaparathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaparathnĂŒshĂ«|shaparathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaparathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshaparathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaparathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishaparathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaparathnĂŒro|shaparathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaparathnknĂŒro|goshaparathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaparathnĂŒro|gokishaparathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaparathnĂŒmu|shaparathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaparathnknĂŒmu|goshaparathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaparathnĂŒmu|gokishaparathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaparathshĂ«nĂŒ|shaparathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaparathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshaparathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaparathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishaparathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaparathshĂ«ro|shaparathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaparathnkshĂ«ro|goshaparathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaparathshĂ«ro|gokishaparathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaparathshĂ«mu|shaparathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaparathnkshĂ«mu|goshaparathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaparathshĂ«mu|gokishaparathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaparathronĂŒ|shaparathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaparathnkronĂŒ|goshaparathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaparathronĂŒ|gokishaparathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaparathroshĂ«|shaparathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaparathnkroshĂ«|goshaparathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaparathroshĂ«|gokishaparathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaparathromu|shaparathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaparathnkromu|goshaparathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaparathromu|gokishaparathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaparathmunĂŒ|shaparathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaparathnkmunĂŒ|goshaparathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaparathmunĂŒ|gokishaparathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaparathmushĂ«|shaparathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaparathnkmushĂ«|goshaparathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaparathmushĂ«|gokishaparathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaparathmuro|shaparathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaparathnkmuro|goshaparathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaparathmuro|gokishaparathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
